text: One day, Akbar drew a line on the floor and ordered.
but don't rub out any part of it.
No one knew what to do.
Each minister looked at the line and was puzzled.
No one could think of any way to make it longer.
No one could think of how it could be made shorter without erasing it.
Birbal started smiling. When it was his turn, he went near the line.
